gates.title: Brain exposes a read-only proactive opportunity queue with evidence, feedback and suppression
evidence_required: Migration 80 creates signals, opportunities, evidence, preparations, proposals, proposal events, suppression rules and action authorizations
src/opportunity_orchestrator.py builds opportunities from existing Brain data, writes optional dry-run reports and keeps external action classes behind explicit authorization
tests/test_opportunity_orchestrator.py covers migration, zero proposals, max-three proposals, evidence refs, feedback, suppression, server exports and visible-output privacy guardrails

gates.title: Product Knowledge fails release when managed backend surfaces drift
evidence_required: scripts/verify_product_surface_alignment.py reconciles backend route families with catalog capabilities and source refs
scripts/pre-release-verify.sh runs product-surface before managed-mcp-lock, release readiness and pytest
tests/test_product_surface_alignment.py covers valid alignment, unmapped managed route prefixes and missing backend source refs

gates.title: Structured Product Knowledge catalog remains valid
evidence_required: tests/test_product_knowledge.py keeps search, answers, handlers, validation and system catalog discoverability covered

gates.title: Packaged installs keep receiving the managed MCP runtime package
evidence_required: bin/nexo-brain.js copies managed_mcp as a runtime package
src/auto_update.py preserves managed_mcp during packaged updates and copies the managed MCP runner

gates.title: Managed MCP provider locks are checked against npm latest before release
evidence_required: scripts/verify_managed_mcp_lock.py compares src/managed_mcp/lock.json against npm latest version, integrity, tarball and binary metadata
scripts/pre-release-verify.sh still runs the managed-mcp-lock step before release readiness and pytest
tests/test_managed_mcp_release_gate.py covers stale locks, update behavior and MCP binary selection

gates.title: Public tool map includes opportunity orchestrator tools
evidence_required: tool-enforcement-map.json includes the live nexo_opportunity_* server tools
scripts/verify_tool_map.py passes against server.py and plugin tools

gates.title: Public release surfaces and integration artifacts are aligned for v7.30.23
evidence_required: README, llms, homepage, blog index, blog post, changelog page and sitemap reference v7.30.23
Claude plugin, ClawHub skill and OpenClaw package metadata reference 7.30.23
Release smoke and readiness checks validate the v7.30.23 contract before tag publish
